tenders_cta_title: Become our partner and earn with us
tenders_lawyers_hero_headline: Expand your client base: Partnership with Techrealt for Lawyers and Attorneys!
tenders_for_lawyers_subtitle: Techrealt provides its clients and partners with a single digital service for buying, selling, renting and leasing real estate. The service is currently under development.
tenders_about_text: Expand your client base: Partnership with Techrealt for Lawyers and Attorneys!
tenders_earnings_text: Earn commissions on every client referred and every deal closed.
tenders_earnings_block_title: Exclusive clients, earn risk-free: Our partnership is your success!
tenders_earnings_block_description: Be confident in your success with TechRealt! We provide exclusive clients so you can focus on your professional work. At the end of the month we issue you an invoice based on the number of successful deals. Minimum risk - maximum earning opportunities.
tenders_advantages_list_title: Digital services for successful business development
tenders_advantage_1: Access to the digital platform and 24/7 support
tenders_advantage_3: Digital management of client work through a CRM system
tenders_step_1: Fill out the form on the website
lawyers_step_1: Fill out the questionnaire on our website
lawyers_step_1_desc: Simply fill out a short questionnaire on our website to join our referral program
lawyers_step_2_desc: After submitting the questionnaire, our representative will contact you to discuss details and answer your questions. We will review your application and make a decision on cooperation.
lawyers_step_3: We sign an agency agreement for the provision of services
lawyers_step_3_desc: We sign an agency agreement for the provision of services on terms that are favourable to you.
lawyers_step_4: We refer to you our clients who need legal assistance
lawyers_step_4_desc: When we win a tender, we will refer to you clients who need legal assistance. We provide access to upload full information about you and your practice on the profile site.
lawyers_step_5_desc: You receive: Exclusive clients, access to the digital platform and 24/7 support, savings on advertising costs. We issue an invoice based on the volume of work and the number of clients referred to you, on individual terms
